nasb.text: Be of the same mind toward one another; do not be haughty in mind, but associate with the lowly. Do not be wise in your own estimation.

esv.text: Live in harmony with one another. Do not be haughty, but associate with the lowly.  Never be wise in your own sight.

cnv.text: 要彼此同心，不可心高氣傲，倒要俯就卑微的。不可自以為聰明。

ccb.text: 要彼此和睦，不可心高气傲，反要俯就卑微的人，不可自以为聪明。

csbs.text: 要彼此同心；不要心高气傲，而要俯就卑微的人；不要自以为聪明。
